title: Value Aggregation in Hadoop MapReduce
description: The 'lib/aggregate' directory contains Java classes for value aggregation. These classes implement the 'ValueAggregator' interface, performing sum, max, min, and count operations. Collaboration occurs within MapReduce workflow, with components like 'ValueAggregatorMapper', 'ValueAggregatorReducer', and 'ValueHistogram'. This modular design adheres to Hadoop's API standards, showcasing a clear separation of concerns in the MapReduce process. It follows the Strategy design pattern, allowing for easy extension and modification of aggregation functions.
